params.balancesScaled18: Current pool balances, sorted in token registration order
params.maxAmountsInScaled18: Maximum input amounts, sorted in token registration order
params.minBptAmountOut: Minimum amount of output pool tokens
params.router: The address (usually a router contract) that initiated a swap operation on the Vault
params.userData: Arbitrary data sent with the encoded request

returns.amountsInScaled18: Input token amounts, sorted in token registration order
returns.bptAmountOut: Calculated pool token amount to receive
returns.returnData: Arbitrary data with an encoded response from the pool
returns.swapFeeAmountsScaled18: The amount of swap fees charged for each token

params.balancesScaled18: Current pool balances, sorted in token registration order
params.maxBptAmountIn: Maximum amount of input pool tokens
params.minAmountsOutScaled18: Minimum output amounts, sorted in token registration order
params.router: The address (usually a router contract) that initiated a swap operation on the Vault
params.userData: Arbitrary data sent with the encoded request

returns.amountsOutScaled18: Amount of tokens to receive, sorted in token registration order
returns.bptAmountIn: Calculated pool token amount to burn
returns.returnData: Arbitrary data with an encoded response from the pool
returns.swapFeeAmountsScaled18: The amount of swap fees charged for each token

onAddLiquidityCustom(address,uint256[],u.notice: Add liquidity to the pool with a custom hook.

onRemoveLiquidityCustom(address,uint256,.notice: Remove liquidity from the pool with a custom hook.
